stimuli.description: Shape stimulus on a trial where both the judged dimension (task) and the spatial cue/quadrant are the same as the previous trial.

response.response_key_js: (() => { try { if (typeof window.correct_response !== 'undefined' && window.correct_response !== null && window.correct_response !== '') return window.correct_response; const img = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus img.center'); if (!img) return null; const src = img.src || ''; const color = src.includes('blue') ? 'blue' : 'orange'; const form = src.includes('circle') ? 'circle' : 'square'; const q = window.whichQuadrant; const dim = (q === 1 || q === 2) ? window.quadMappings.top : window.quadMappings.bottom; const rm = window.responseMappings; return dim === 'form' ? rm.form[form] : rm.color[color]; } catch (e) { return null; } })()

stimuli.description: Shape stimulus on a trial where the judged dimension (task) stays the same but the spatial cue/quadrant switches to the other quadrant in the same pair relative to the previous trial.

response.response_key_js: (() => { try { if (typeof window.correct_response !== 'undefined' && window.correct_response !== null && window.correct_response !== '') return window.correct_response; const img = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus img.center'); if (!img) return null; const src = img.src || ''; const color = src.includes('blue') ? 'blue' : 'orange'; const form = src.includes('circle') ? 'circle' : 'square'; const q = window.whichQuadrant; const dim = (q === 1 || q === 2) ? window.quadMappings.top : window.quadMappings.bottom; const rm = window.responseMappings; return dim === 'form' ? rm.form[form] : rm.color[color]; } catch (e) { return null; } })()

stimuli.description: Shape stimulus on a trial where the judged dimension (task) switches, which necessarily moves the shape to the other quadrant pair (cue switches) relative to the previous trial.

response.response_key_js: (() => { try { if (typeof window.correct_response !== 'undefined' && window.correct_response !== null && window.correct_response !== '') return window.correct_response; const img = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus img.center'); if (!img) return null; const src = img.src || ''; const color = src.includes('blue') ? 'blue' : 'orange'; const form = src.includes('circle') ? 'circle' : 'square'; const q = window.whichQuadrant; const dim = (q === 1 || q === 2) ? window.quadMappings.top : window.quadMappings.bottom; const rm = window.responseMappings; return dim === 'form' ? rm.form[form] : rm.color[color]; } catch (e) { return null; } })()

task_specific.response_key_source: window.correct_response is set globally per trial by getCue() before the shape is shown; response keys are the comma (',') and period ('.') keys. The stimulus-to-key mapping is counterbalanced by window.efVars.group_index (default 1) via getResponseMappings, which sets window.quadMappings and window.responseMappings. Reading window.correct_response is the authoritative source; the DOM+state computation is a fallback.
task_specific.design_notes: Practice: practiceLen=4 (loops to 75% accuracy or 3 attempts). Test: numTestBlocks=3, numTrialsPerBlock=64. An attention check runs between test blocks. Condition 'task_switch_cue_stay' is impossible (a task switch always moves to the other quadrant pair). First trial of each block records condition='na'.

phase_detection.complete: (() => !!document.getElementById('finished_message') || /Experiment Complete|Thanks for completing this task/i.test((document.body && document.body.innerText) || ''))()
phase_detection.instructions: (() => !!document.querySelector('#jspsych-fullscreen-btn') || !!document.querySelector('#jspsych-instructions-next') || /index finger|practice round|full screen mode|will take around/i.test((document.body && document.body.innerText) || ''))()
phase_detection.feedback: (() => /read your feedback|completed \d+ out of|begin practice|start the test portion|Done with this task|Correct!|Incorrect|Respond Faster/i.test((document.body && document.body.innerText) || ''))()

timing.trial_context_js: (() => { try { return 'quad:' + window.whichQuadrant + ' shape:' + window.shape; } catch (e) { return ''; } })()

attention_check.response_js: (() => { const el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-attention-check-rdoc-stimulus'); if (!el) return null; const t = (el.textContent || '').toLowerCase(); let m = t.match(/press the ([a-z]) key/); if (m) return m[1]; if (t.includes('first letter')) return 'a'; if (t.includes('second to last')) return 'y'; if (t.includes('third to last')) return 'x'; if (t.includes('second letter')) return 'b'; if (t.includes('third letter')) return 'c'; if (t.includes('last letter')) return 'z'; return null; })()
